ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expenditure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for subcategories */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., food, beverages, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expenditure category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  "expenditure" REAL /* Expenditure percentage for the category in the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expenditure_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* The year for which expenditure data is available */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of report data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expenditure data included in the report */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Actual data value included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES expenditure_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year for which the economic indicator is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each expenditure category
Type of category (e.g., food, beverages, etc.)
Unique identifier for each data entry
